name: The Royal Heights
description:
Set on a lush half-acre in the prestigious Runda neighborhood, this elegant double-storey 4-bedroom all en-suite home offers generous space, comfort, and privacy—ideal for refined family living in a serene and secure environment.

The home features a bright lounge and dining area, a spacious kitchen with pantry and store, and a versatile family room perfect for relaxed evenings. There is also a study/playroom, making it ideal for families working or studying from home. Upstairs, a veranda provides a peaceful outdoor extension overlooking the garden, while the outdoor patio offers the perfect setting for entertaining.

Additional highlights include a garden room, DSQ for two, solar water heating, a shared 25 KVA generator for backup power, and electric fencing for enhanced security. 

 Perfect for those seeking space, privacy, and a premium Runda lifestyle.
